## Summary

<!-- What does this change, and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Match the Conventional Commits type in your PR title. -->

- [ ] `feat` (new behavior, minor release)
- [ ] `fix` (bug fix, patch release)
- [ ] `chore` / `docs` / `refactor` / `test` (no release)
- [ ] Breaking change (`!` or `BREAKING CHANGE:`, major release)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (drives release-please versioning)
- [ ] The Validate workflow passes (actionlint, `action.yml` structure, embedded script syntax)
- [ ] README updated if inputs, outputs, or behavior changed
